title: lithocarpus kamengii
intro: Lithocarpus kamengii, also known as the Kamengi or Himalayan Lithocarpus, is a plant species belonging to the beech family (Fagaceae) native to the Eastern Himalayas. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus kamengii include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are used to make infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
